_loomcycle.description: Email delivery via SMTP. Generic recipe for Resend / SendGrid / Mailgun / etc. via their SMTP relay endpoints.
_loomcycle.agent_prompt_hint: Use this to send transactional email. Pass to + subject + body in call args. For scheduled-run digest emails: on_complete.mcp.call.server = 'email', tool = 'send_email'.
